---
title: "Figure1D_reproducibility"
output:
  html_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
# ---- Project-wide knitr settings ----
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = here::here())
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
  cache = FALSE
)

# ---- Output discipline ----
# ALL file writes in this Rmd must go under FIG_PREFIX.
# No hardcoded paths, no scratch files outside OUT_DIR.
OUT_DIR <- here::here("output")
FIG_PREFIX <- file.path(OUT_DIR, "Figure1D")
dir.create(OUT_DIR, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Prevent auto Rplots.pdf when running non-interactively
if (!interactive()) pdf(NULL)
# ---- Transparent background theme patch ----
# Apply before ggsave to make all backgrounds transparent
transparent_theme <- theme(
  plot.background       = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
  panel.background      = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
  legend.background     = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
  legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
  legend.key            = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA)
)
```


```{r load-pipeline}
# Only source if objects not already loaded
# (allows skipping this chunk when interactively re-running)
if (!exists("scores_all") || !exists("dat_image")) {
  source(here::here("R", "load_and_preprocess.R"))
}

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)
  library(patchwork)
  library(ggpubr)
  library(ggrepel)
})
# ---- Transparent background theme patch ----
transparent_theme <- theme(
  plot.background       = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
  panel.background      = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
  legend.background     = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
  legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
  legend.key            = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA)
)
```


```{r filter-vehicle-il34pos}
# Focus on IL34-positive vehicle samples across three experiments.
# IL34pos is the standard iMGL culture condition used throughout Figures 2-5.
veh <- scores_all %>%
  filter(Stimulus == "Vehicle", IL34 == "pos") %>%
  mutate(Experiment = factor(Experiment, levels = c("Exp1", "Exp2", "Exp3")))

cat("Vehicle (IL34+) profiles used:", nrow(veh), "\n")
cat("Breakdown:\n"); print(table(veh$Experiment, veh$Time_hr))

var_exp <- pca_model$sdev^2 / sum(pca_model$sdev^2)
pc1_lab <- sprintf("PC1 (%.1f%%)", 100 * var_exp[1])
pc2_lab <- sprintf("PC2 (%.1f%%)", 100 * var_exp[2])
```

```{r panel-A-trajectories}
# Per-(Experiment, Time) median PC coordinates (averaging across the 6 FOVs)
traj <- veh %>%
  group_by(Experiment, Time_hr) %>%
  summarise(PC1 = median(PC1), PC2 = median(PC2), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(Experiment, Time_hr)

exp_colors <- c("Exp1" = "#E64B35", "Exp2" = "#4DBBD5", "Exp3" = "#00A087")

# Reference: LPS+IFNγ endpoint for scale context
lps_ref <- scores_all %>%
  filter(Stimulus == "LPS+IFNg", IL34 == "pos", Time_hr == 24) %>%
  group_by(Experiment) %>%
  summarise(PC1 = mean(PC1), PC2 = mean(PC2), .groups = "drop")

p_traj <- ggplot(traj, aes(PC1, PC2, color = Experiment, group = Experiment)) +
  # LPS reference points (drawn first so they're in the background)
geom_point(data = lps_ref, aes(PC1, PC2),
           color = "grey60", size = 3.5, shape = 4, stroke = 1.2,
           alpha = 0.7,
           inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = lps_ref %>% slice(1), aes(PC1, PC2),
            label = "LPS+IFNγ (24h)", color = "grey50",
            vjust = -1.2, size = 3, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  # Vehicle trajectories
  geom_path(linewidth = 0.9, alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_point(aes(size = Time_hr)) +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(2, 5), name = "Time (h)",
                        breaks = c(0, 8, 16, 24)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = exp_colors) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    data = traj %>% group_by(Experiment) %>% slice_max(Time_hr, n = 1),
    aes(label = Experiment),
    size = 3.8, show.legend = FALSE,
    box.padding = 0.3, segment.color = "grey60"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  labs(
    title = "Vehicle morphology trajectories across 3 independent experiments",
    x = pc1_lab, y = pc2_lab
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right"
  )
```

```{r panel-B-signal-to-noise}
# Profile distance in the full centered feature space (not just PC1-2).
# Technical noise  = same timepoint, different experiments, both Vehicle IL34+.
# Biological signal = same timepoint, same experiment, Vehicle vs LPS+IFNg (IL34+).

profile_mat <- dat_image %>%
  filter(IL34 == "pos", Stimulus %in% c("Vehicle", "LPS+IFNg")) %>%
  group_by(Experiment, Stimulus, Time_hr) %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(final_features), \(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)),
            .groups = "drop")

get_vec <- function(exp, stim, t) {
  row <- profile_mat %>%
    filter(Experiment == exp, Stimulus == stim, Time_hr == t)
  if (nrow(row) == 0) return(NULL)
  as.numeric(row[, final_features])
}

times     <- sort(unique(profile_mat$Time_hr))
exps      <- c("Exp1", "Exp2", "Exp3")
exp_pairs <- combn(exps, 2, simplify = FALSE)

# 1. Within-vehicle, across experiments (technical noise)
tech_noise <- map_dfr(times, function(t) {
  map_dfr(exp_pairs, function(pp) {
    v1 <- get_vec(pp[1], "Vehicle", t)
    v2 <- get_vec(pp[2], "Vehicle", t)
    if (is.null(v1) || is.null(v2)) return(NULL)
    tibble(t = t, pair = paste(pp, collapse = "-"),
           d = sqrt(sum((v1 - v2)^2)),
           type = "Within-Vehicle\n(cross-experiment)")
  })
})

# 2. Vehicle vs LPS+IFNg, within experiment (biological signal)
bio_signal <- map_dfr(times, function(t) {
  map_dfr(exps, function(e) {
    v1 <- get_vec(e, "Vehicle", t)
    v2 <- get_vec(e, "LPS+IFNg", t)
    if (is.null(v1) || is.null(v2)) return(NULL)
    tibble(t = t, pair = e,
           d = sqrt(sum((v1 - v2)^2)),
           type = "Vehicle vs LPS+IFNγ\n(within-experiment)")
  })
})

# ── Combine timepoint-level data (for display only) ───────────────────────────
dist_df <- bind_rows(tech_noise, bio_signal) %>%
  mutate(type = factor(type, levels = c(
    "Within-Vehicle\n(cross-experiment)",
    "Vehicle vs LPS+IFNγ\n(within-experiment)"
  )))

# ── FIX: Aggregate to experiment/pair level before statistical test ───────────
# Mirrors Figure 3: image → experiment → test, avoiding pseudoreplication
# Here: timepoint-distances → pair/experiment-mean → t-test
#
# tech_noise: 3 experiment-pairs × 4 timepoints → average → 3 means
# bio_signal: 3 experiments    × 4 timepoints → average → 3 means

tech_noise_agg <- tech_noise %>%
  group_by(pair) %>%
  summarise(d_mean = mean(d), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(type = "Within-Vehicle\n(cross-experiment)")

bio_signal_agg <- bio_signal %>%
  group_by(pair) %>%
  summarise(d_mean = mean(d), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(type = "Vehicle vs LPS+IFNγ\n(within-experiment)")

dist_agg <- bind_rows(tech_noise_agg, bio_signal_agg) %>%
  mutate(type = factor(type, levels = levels(dist_df$type)))

# t-test on experiment-level means (n = 3 per group)
tt_res <- t.test(
  dist_agg$d_mean[dist_agg$type == "Within-Vehicle\n(cross-experiment)"],
  dist_agg$d_mean[dist_agg$type == "Vehicle vs LPS+IFNγ\n(within-experiment)"]
)

cat("\nExperiment-level summary (mean across timepoints):\n")
print(dist_agg %>%
        group_by(type) %>%
        summarise(n = n(), mean_d = mean(d_mean), sd_d = sd(d_mean)))

cat(sprintf(
  "\nWelch t-test on experiment-level means (n=3 per group):\n  t = %.3f, df = %.2f, p = %.4f\n",
  tt_res$statistic, tt_res$parameter, tt_res$p.value
))

# Save stats
write.csv(
  tibble(
    contrast    = "Vehicle vs LPS+IFNg / cross-exp noise",
    n_units     = 3,
    mean_noise  = mean(tech_noise_agg$d_mean),
    mean_signal = mean(bio_signal_agg$d_mean),
    t           = tt_res$statistic,
    df          = tt_res$parameter,
    p_value     = tt_res$p.value,
    ci_lower    = tt_res$conf.int[1],
    ci_upper    = tt_res$conf.int[2]
  ),
  paste0(FIG_PREFIX, "_B_snr_stats.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# ── Plot ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Background jitter = per-timepoint distances (context only, not tested)
# Filled diamonds   = experiment-level means (the actual statistical units)
# Annotation        = t-test result on those means

y_bracket <- max(dist_df$d) * 1.08
y_label   <- max(dist_df$d) * 1.14
p_label   <- if (tt_res$p.value < 0.001) "p < 0.001" else
             sprintf("p = %.3f", tt_res$p.value)

p_quant <- ggplot(dist_df, aes(type, d, fill = type)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.5, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.55) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = type), width = 0.12, size = 1.4,
              alpha = 0.35, show.legend = FALSE) +
  # Experiment-level means as solid diamonds (the n=3 statistical units)
  geom_point(data = dist_agg, aes(type, d_mean),
             shape = 18, size = 5, color = "black",
             inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  # Manual significance bracket from experiment-level t-test
  annotate("segment",
           x = 1, xend = 2, y = y_bracket, yend = y_bracket) +
  annotate("segment",
           x = 1, xend = 1,
           y = y_bracket, yend = y_bracket - max(dist_df$d) * 0.02) +
  annotate("segment",
           x = 2, xend = 2,
           y = y_bracket, yend = y_bracket - max(dist_df$d) * 0.02) +
  annotate("text", x = 1.5, y = y_label,
           label = sprintf("%s\n(t-test, n=3 experiments)", p_label),
           size = 3.8, lineheight = 0.9) +
  scale_fill_manual(values  = c("#2E86AB", "#CC0033"), guide = "none") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#2E86AB", "#CC0033")) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, max(dist_df$d) * 1.22)) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  labs(
    title    = "Baseline variation vs stimulus effect",
    subtitle = "Vehicle variability is smaller than the LPS+IFNγ-induced shift",
    x        = NULL,
    y        = "Euclidean distance in feature space"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title    = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.text.x   = element_text(size = 10)
  )
```

```{r combine-save, fig.width=16, fig.height=5}
p_final <- p_traj + p_quant + patchwork::plot_layout(widths = c(1.5, 1))
p_final

# Apply transparent theme to all sub-plots via patchwork's `&` operator
p_final_transparent <- p_final & transparent_theme

ggsave(paste0(FIG_PREFIX, "_reproducibility.png"),
       p_final_transparent, width = 14, height = 5, dpi = 600, bg = "transparent")
ggsave(paste0(FIG_PREFIX, "_reproducibility.pdf"),
       p_final_transparent, width = 16, height = 5, bg = "transparent")

cat("\nSaved: ", FIG_PREFIX, "_reproducibility.{png,pdf}\n", sep = "")
```
